results.rendered_html:
akara a. [na. ba.]
1 Handless, maimed.
2 Exempt from tax or duty.
3 [na. ta.] Not doing or acting; not disposed to work, ceasing from work.
— rā N. of a plant āmalakī, Emblic Myrobalan, Phyllanthus Emblica (akaṃ duḥkhaṃ sevanāt lokānāṃ rāti gṛhṇāti nāśayatīti; rā-ka  Tv. )
